LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF HARRY TAUB'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER DIRECTING ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDATE AS RELATED TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE AS RECOMMENDED BY HON. MARLA J. MILLER RE: DEMUR AND LEAVE GRANTED NOV 13, 2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PAPERS WERE NOT FILED AND SERVED IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SEC. 1005(B). THE MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES WAS FILED ON APRIL 1, 2014, FOUR COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. ADDITIONALLY, ALTHOUGH THE MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES ALLUDES TO DIFFICULTIES IN OBTAINING THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD, THE COURT CANNOT ISSUE A RULING WITHOUT THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

No apperances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

RESPONDENTS STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AND STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA CLIENT SECURITY FUND COMMISSION'S Motion To Dismiss Action is GRANETD. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)

Ntc Of Application For Order Directing Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate As Related To 1st Amd Complt - Petition For Writ Of Mandate As Recommended By Hon. Marla J. Miller Re: Demur And Leave Granted Nov 13, 2013
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - HARRY TAUB, TEL. NO. 317-2899, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. TRACEY L. MCCORMICK, ASSISTANT GENERAL COUNSEL, TEL. NO. 538-2324 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF HARRY TAUB'S Application For Order Directing Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate As Related To 1st Amended Complaint - Petition For Writ Of Mandate As Recommended By Hon. Marla J. Miller Re: Demur And Leave Granted Nov 13, 2013 is Off calendar. The papers were not filed and served in compliance with CCP sec. 1005(b). The memorandum of points and authorities was filed on April 1, 2014, four court days before the hearing. Additionally, although the memorandum of points and authorities alludes to difficulties in obtaining the administrative record, the Court cannot issue a ruling without the administrative record. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: HARRY TAUB, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER.
MARK TORRES-GIL, ESQ., 415.538.2012, FOR DEFENDNATS STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA & STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA, CLIENT SECURITY FUND.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT SUSTAINS DEFENDANTS STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA & STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA, CLIENT SECURITY FUND's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE A CAUSE OVER WHICH THIS COURT MAY HAVE POTENTIAL JURISDICTION. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
